decisions.rationale: Rigid P-controller orbit never naturally reached fight_range — orbit radius too large
Distance-based return felt disconnected; hit-and-run timer feels intentional

decisions.decision: Velocity-based facing outside FIGHTING, lerp_angle inside
decisions.rationale: Smooth aim-then-fire feel; velocity facing breaks during aiming rotation
User raised after playtest — snappier aim
